title: Tala Silicone Baking Mould, 6 Cup Strawberry Shaped Mould for Baking Individual Themed Cakes, Biscuits, Jelly's, Freezer Pops and Boiled Sweets, BPA Free and Dishwasher Safe (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
MATERIAL: These moulds are durable, flexible, and non-stick, making it easy to release cakes , baked treats or ice cubes
DESIGN: It features six watermelon slice shaped summer-themed cups, perfect for creating fun, seasonal treats
TEMPERATURE RESISTANT: The mould is safe to use in a wide temperature range, from -40°C to 230°C (-40°F to 446°F), making it suitable for the oven, microwave, freezer, and dishwasher
VERSATILE: Ideal for baking cupcakes, muffins, jelly, chocolates, ice cubes or even yogurt-based snacks, adding a summery touch to any recipe
REUSABLE AND ECO-FRIENDLY: This mould is reusable, reducing the need for disposable baking liners and pans, and is made from food-grade silicone that is BPA-free and safe for repeated use
